title: No serious injuries following Louis Fourie collision
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Following the collision on...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Following the collision on Louis Fourie Road on Friday 8 August, no serious injuries have been reported.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Following the collision on Louis Fourie Road on Friday 8 August, no serious injuries have been reported."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The accident took place in the intersection near the Heiderand Mall."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to Southern Cape Police Spokesperson, Chris Spies, two vehicles collided at around 18:30 that evening.","html":"According to Southern Cape Police Spokesperson, Chris Spies, two vehicles collided at around 18:30 that evening."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"One vehicle was flipped on its roof."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mossel Bay Fire, Rescue and Disaster Management teams were on the scene.","html":"Mossel Bay Fire, Rescue and Disaster Management teams were on the scene."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"An accident report was subsequently filed with the police.","html":"An accident report was subsequently filed with the police."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous articles:","html":"Previous articles:"},{"type":"list","items":["Accident on Louis Fourie near Heiderand Mall"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: No serious injuries following Louis Fourie collision
